earlier.headline: US-Iran war escalates as Trump negotiations fail, Israel advances in Lebanon amid ceasefire tensions

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.text: Netanyahu launches terror attack on Beirut, destroying Trump’s ceasefire. We need to detach from Israel immediately.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.text: While the world focuses on the destruction in Iran, we must not ignore what Israel is doing in Lebanon. 1,461 have been killed. 4,430 have been injured. 1.2 million have been displaced. Israel now occupies 14% of Lebanon. Enough is enough. No more US military aid to Israel.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.text: Vance says it's bizarre that Iran would want the war to continue over its desire to protect a foreign country (Lebanon) "that has nothing to do with them." Meanwhile, official bipartisan US policy for decades has been, and still is, that the US will go to war to protect Israel.

footnotes: 3. Independent: Critical of all sides, focuses on policy implications
earlier.notes: Well-sourced reporting on ongoing conflict with some opinionated framing
earlier.body: Three-perspective roundup.

earlier.body: The CRISPIEST POTATOES EVER take only 3 steps: Just boil 'em, smash 'em, roast 'em. Ingredients: Potatoes, oil, salt. Steps: 1. Boil until tender. 2. Smash flat. 3. Roast at high heat until crispy.

earlier.headline: Viral One-Pan Lemon Garlic Butter Chicken and Asparagus Recipe
earlier.body: Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, 1 lb asparagus, 4 tbsp butter, 4 garlic cloves, 1 lemon, herbs, salt/pepper. Steps: 1. Season chicken. 2. Sear in skillet 5 min per side. 3. Add asparagus, garlic, butter, lemon juice. 4. Bake at 400F for 12-15 min until done. Ready in under 30 minutes!
earlier.notes: Actual step-by-step cooking recipe going viral with video demonstration

stories.headline: Artificial sweeteners show multi-generational harm in mice study
stories.body: Potential adverse effects across offspring.

earlier.headline: Artemis II astronauts return successfully celebrated by Trump
earlier.body: U.S. President Donald J. Trump has posted a statement on his Truth Social app congratulating the Artemis II crew on a successful mission.

earlier.headline: Diet lacking 2 amino acids reboots aggressive pediatric brain cancer treatment
earlier.body: NEJM: Experimental model shows mechanism for methionine/arginine restriction.

earlier.headline: NASA captures Artemis II eclipse totality from lunar orbit
earlier.body: THE ARTEMIS II ECLIPSE. April 6, 2026. Totality, beyond Earth. From lunar orbit, the Moon eclipses the Sun, revealing a view few in human history have ever witnessed. Photo: NASA

earlier.headline: Webb captures Messier 58 galaxy in near/mid-IR revealing star-forming properties
earlier.body: New Webb image of Messier 58 as part of 55 massive star-forming galaxies treasury for evolution insights.

earlier.headline: Mass US Bee Die-Off: 1.6M Colonies Lost Amid USDA Bee Lab Closure Plans
earlier.body: Despite suddenly losing 1.6 million bee colonies... Trump WH planning to close USDA’s premier bee laboratory.
